svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(141, 161, 1), rgb(167, 192, 128)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(141, 161, 1), rgb(167, 192, 128));
fill: light-dark(rgb(141, 161, 1), rgb(167, 192, 128)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(141, 161, 1), rgb(167, 192, 128));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 68px; height: 1px; padding-top: 450px; margin-left: 26px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #5C6A72;
